structure.text:
Subject: NCM-2025-09-16 New Investor: First National Bank of America
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-09-16 12:18:58-07:00



ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

Capital Markets is pleased to announce First National Bank of America (FNBA) as a new brokered lending partner. FNBA offers a range of Non-QM products, specializing in unique and underserved property types, including pre-HUD and single-wide manufactured homes, barndominiums, land, and non-warrantable condos.  This partnership expands NOVA’s product offerings and enhances our ability to serve clients who require non-traditional solutions.

Channel: Brokered

Product Type: Non-QM

 

Guidelines <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/:f:/s/Home/EpXIZs7SmehJrsJ6oVgg7BEBWA6_Zr_dS8AS54-Y8SGpDg?e=sLKJFe> 

Marketing <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/:f:/s/Home/Ev8ePWzoTCJMhXmIFrdWGdQBwRz7j7qEYrsvPZ7NO_QKXg?e=Qhicmx> 

 

PRODUCT HIGHLIGHTS

*	Manufactured Homes

	*	Pre-HUD (pre-1976) permissible
	*	Home can have been moved more than once
	*	Investment options available on double and single-wide

*	Barndominiums

	*	Purchase transactions only
	*	660 FICO, 80% LTV, up to 20-year terms 

*	Land Loans

	*	Loan amounts up to $1.2M
	*	No acreage restrictions and no prepay penalties

*	Non-Warrantable Condos

	*	$50K - $3M loan amounts, up to 80% LTV; purchase or C/O Refinance
	*	No condo questionnaire required
